9e2f571c-6f51-452d-9ae9-ad33d5b3dc95.label: text_chunk
9e2f571c-6f51-452d-9ae9-ad33d5b3dc95.text:
NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (page 1 of 3)

THIS AGREEMENT is made between the parties named at the end of this document.WHEREAS, both parties may provide certain confidential and proprietary information to each other in connection with the business purposes described in Exhibit A attached hereto ("the Business Purpose") and each desires that  any  such  information provided shall be kept confidential by the other party; and

e09dd689-7a4e-4834-b593-b4969c373485.label: text_chunk
e09dd689-7a4e-4834-b593-b4969c373485.text:
WHEREAS, in consideration of the disclosure of such information each party is willing to  keep  the  other party's information confidential in accordance with the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement.NOW IT IS HEREBY AGREED AS FOLLOWS:

1.

e04df2ec-473f-4a97-a447-b0ab73f9a08d.label: text_chunk
e04df2ec-473f-4a97-a447-b0ab73f9a08d.text:
Confidentiality

Each party may use the information received from the other party hereunder and may provide such information to its parent corporation or any other subsidiaries thereof and their respective employees as applicable for their use  only  in connection with the Business Purpose.Each party agrees that, for a period of 5 years from receipt of information from the  other party hereunder,

1bfc8ed9-0663-4257-82a3-fc9ef7907e94.label: text_chunk
1bfc8ed9-0663-4257-82a3-fc9ef7907e94.text:
such party shall use the same means it uses to protect its own confidential and proprietary information to prevent the disclosure and to protect the confidentiality of both:

i) written information received from the other party which is marked or identified as "confidential";

 and

ii) oral or visual information identified as confidential at the time of disclosure which is reduced to written form and provided to the other in such written form promptly after such oral or visual disclosure,

hereinafter collectively referred to as "the Information".

2cf7d778-a45f-4221-8ad2-e8d3045461bd.label: text_chunk

ef7b7710-44ec-4e49-bf16-880f4cd7f391.label: text_chunk
ef7b7710-44ec-4e49-bf16-880f4cd7f391.text:
or

v) disclosed without similar restrictions by the party owning the Information to any third party; or

vi) approved by the other party for disclosure; or

vii) required to be disclosed pursuant to a governmental or legal requirement provided that the disclosing party gives to the other party written notice of such requirement prior to any such disclosure.

viii) publicly known or becomes publicly known not due to any unauthorised act of the recipient party;

4ed7a450-a815-49e3-803b-c2c7c05a875a.label: text_chunk
4ed7a450-a815-49e3-803b-c2c7c05a875a.text:
or

ix) rightfully received from a third party; or

x) independently developed by the recipient party without use of the other party's Information; or

xi) disclosed without similar restrictions by the party owning the Information to any third party; or

xii) approved by the other party for disclosure;

46da224e-a5b7-42fc-834c-da737d20cb5a.label: text_chunk
46da224e-a5b7-42fc-834c-da737d20cb5a.text:
or

NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (page 2 of 3)

xiii) required to be disclosed pursuant to a governmental or legal requirement provided that the disclosing party gives to the other party written notice of such requirement prior to any such disclosure.

2.

11c19707-164f-43c2-95fa-04ac7207a551.label: text_chunk
11c19707-164f-43c2-95fa-04ac7207a551.text:
Return of Information

Upon completion of the Business Purpose and/or upon written request of the party providing the Information, the other party shall within 14 days return all copies of the Information to the providing party or certify in writing that all copies of the  Information have been destroyed. Nothing in this clause shall affect the right of either party voluntarily to return the Information, or any part thereof, to the other party at any time.

3.

6f632093-6d67-4914-8bd8-f86dd941d66c.label: text_chunk
6f632093-6d67-4914-8bd8-f86dd941d66c.text:
No Warranty/Liability

Neither party makes any warranty, express or implied, with respect to the Information. Neither party shall be liable to the other or to any other person hereunder for amounts representing loss of profits or loss of business or indirect, consequential or punitive damages of the other or of such other person in connection with the provision or use of the Information hereunder.

4.

1d90915d-7346-419b-9d33-33acb6916e0e.label: text_chunk
1d90915d-7346-419b-9d33-33acb6916e0e.text:
No Further Rights

Nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights by licence or otherwise in the Information except as provided herein.

5.

280d6ebc-ca93-4ce0-9aa5-c48f1f00984a.label: text_chunk
280d6ebc-ca93-4ce0-9aa5-c48f1f00984a.text:
Business Purpose

The parties expressly agree that the provision of Information hereunder and any discussions held in connection with the Business Purpose shall not prevent either party from pursuing similar discussions with third parties provided that no breach of this Agreement is so occasioned or oblige that party to take, continue or forego any action relating to the Business Purpose. Any forecasts or similar material provided by either party to the other shall not constitute any commitments.

6.

03566909-fcea-406c-95a4-020d725345ff.label: text_chunk
03566909-fcea-406c-95a4-020d725345ff.text:
Injunctive Rights

Each party acknowledges and agrees that the Information is the confidential and/or proprietary and/or trade secret information of the other and the unauthorised use or disclosure of the Information could cause irreparable harm and significant injury to the other party for which that other party would have no adequate remedy at  law.

40a0e703-cb44-4b6c-9ee5-b6694f05ff51.label: text_chunk
40a0e703-cb44-4b6c-9ee5-b6694f05ff51.text:
Therefore, each party shall have the right, in addition to any other rights it  may have at law or in equity, to seek and obtain immediate injunctive relief in respect of any breach or potential breach of this Agreement by the other.

7.

e095b0c6-e9ae-43e6-ba06-6df03d90e8ba.label: text_chunk
e095b0c6-e9ae-43e6-ba06-6df03d90e8ba.text:
Media Releases

No media releases, public announcements or public disclosure by either party relating to this Agreement, its subject matter or the Information, including but not  limited to promotional or marketing, shall be made without the prior written consent of the other party.

8. General

8.1 Notices

Any notices required under this Agreement shall be in writing and posted by registered mail return receipt requested to the applicable address indicated in Exhibit A.

cc85ff7a-54d3-4103-91b0-d99c69aeb9ff.label: text_chunk
cc85ff7a-54d3-4103-91b0-d99c69aeb9ff.text:
8.2 Entire Agreement

This Agreement and any attachments hereto:

 i) are the complete and exclusive statement between the parties with respect to the protection of the confidentiality of the Information; and

ii) supersede   all   related   discussions   and   other   communications between the parties;

 and

iii) may only be modified in writing by authorised representatives of the parties.

4f12a117-b201-4258-86ca-4327e372b20f.label: text_chunk
4f12a117-b201-4258-86ca-4327e372b20f.text:
8.3 Governing Law

This Agreement shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the law of England and shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England.

NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (page 3 of 3)

AS WITNESS WHEREOF the parties named below have caused this Agreement to be signed and delivered by its duly authorised representative on this date : ………………………………………………….

f6b00a42-4999-4912-acaf-6fbb50fe03f1.label: text_chunk
f6b00a42-4999-4912-acaf-6fbb50fe03f1.text:
For and on behalf of For and on behalf of iTagg Limited ………………………………………………………… (herein known as “Party 1”) (herein known as “Party 2”) Address Address 3 rd Floor 12 Gough Square London EC4A 3DW England Company number 4344060 Company number.

 Signed Signed. Name Steve Procter Name. Title Director Title.

EXHIBIT A

1.

64b3fe35-156d-4df4-a652-f491432a7d2b.label: text_chunk
64b3fe35-156d-4df4-a652-f491432a7d2b.text:
Business Purpose:

All business related support services, as well as affiliate, reseller and introducer deals and all commercial and business opportunities.  For the purpose of clarity, all information and discussions related to service and product prices, costs, commissions, fees and other monetary matters are also covered under this agreement and to be kept confidential.

413b92a4-e467-4e0d-8aae-5f3f626d771d.label: text_chunk
413b92a4-e467-4e0d-8aae-5f3f626d771d.text:
This includes any prices, costs, commissions, fees or other monetary information offered by one party to the other even if not accepted, as well as any prices, costs, commissions, fees or other monetary information that are accepted by both parties and drawn into a subsequent contract between the parties.

2. Addresses for Notices:

a) Party 1:  As above

b) Party 2:

  As above (insert alternative address and contact name below if necessary)

community_summary.0:
The summary of the relationships involving the NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA) is as follows:

1. **Entities Involved**: NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT, Exhibit A, governmental or legal requirement.

2. **Relationship Descriptions**:
   - The NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT references Exhibit A to specify the business purposes for which confidential information may be shared between the parties involved. This highlights the NDA's role in defining the scope of information sharing.
   - Additionally, the NDA includes a provision that allows for the disclosure of information if mandated by governmental or legal requirements. This indicates that while the NDA aims to protect confidentiality, it also acknowledges the necessity of compliance with legal obligations.

Overall, the NDA serves as a framework for managing confidential information while balancing the need for legal compliance.
community_summary.1:
The relationships outlined involve a Party and a Confidentiality Agreement, emphasizing the importance of confidentiality and the flow of information between entities. 

1. **Confidentiality Agreement**: The Party is bound by a confidentiality agreement with another Party, which mandates that both parties must keep each other's information confidential.

2. **Information Sharing**: The Party is permitted to provide information to its Parent Corporation, indicating a structured flow of information for business purposes.

3. **Information Protection**: The Party has a responsibility to protect the confidentiality of the information it receives, ensuring that it is not disclosed to unauthorized individuals.

4. **Acknowledgment of Confidentiality**: The Party acknowledges that the information shared is confidential and/or proprietary, indicating a mutual recognition of the sensitive nature of the information.

5. **Legal Involvement**: The Party is actively involved in the agreement, possessing defined rights and obligations as stipulated in the terms of the confidentiality agreement.

Overall, these relationships highlight the critical aspects of confidentiality, information management, and the legal responsibilities of the parties involved in the agreement.
community_summary.2: The relationship between the Parent Corporation and its Subsidiaries is characterized by a controlling dynamic. The Parent Corporation exerts control over its Subsidiaries, which are entities that rely on the Parent Corporation for information and resources. This relationship underscores the Parent Corporation's authority and the operational dependency of the Subsidiaries on the Parent for guidance and support.
community_summary.3:
The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph highlight the key aspects of an Agreement and its associated entities:

1. **Agreement and Information**: The Agreement establishes the terms under which rights related to the Information are granted, indicating a direct and significant relationship between the two.

2. **Agreement and Exhibit A**: The Agreement references Exhibit A, which contains specific details relevant to the terms outlined in the Agreement, emphasizing the importance of this exhibit in understanding the Agreement's provisions.

3. **Agreement and Parties**: The Agreement is a legal document that involves the parties bound by its terms, underscoring the collaborative nature of the Agreement and the obligations it creates among the involved entities.

4. **Agreement and Courts of England**: The Agreement is governed by the law of England and is enforced by the courts of England, indicating that any legal disputes arising from the Agreement will be adjudicated within this jurisdiction.

5. **Agreement and England**: The Agreement is subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of England, reinforcing the legal framework within which the Agreement operates.

Overall, the relationships illustrate the Agreement's role as a foundational legal document that defines rights, references important details, involves parties, and is governed by specific legal jurisdictions.

This relationship underscores the importance of collaboration between private entities and government agencies in enhancing national security and infrastructure protection.

community_summary.16: In this relationship, the speaker (referred to as "I") has a duty to report security violations to an official. This obligation highlights the accountability and responsibility of the speaker in ensuring that security issues are communicated to the appropriate authority. community_summary.17: The relationship between "guidance" and "official" is characterized by the official being informed by the guidance. community_summary.18: The relationship between the Court and the Agreement is centered on the Court's authority to interpret the Agreement in legal disputes. community_summary.19: The Whistleblower Protection Act is a significant piece of legislation that amends Title 5 of the United States Code. Its primary purpose is to enhance protections for whistleblowers, ensuring that individuals who report misconduct or illegal activities are safeguarded from retaliation. This relationship underscores the Act's role in promoting transparency and accountability within organizations by providing legal protections to those who come forward with critical information.
community_summary.20: The Intelligence Identities Protection Act is connected to Title 5 through their shared status as components of the United States Code. Both pieces of legislation focus on government accountability and the safeguarding of sensitive information, highlighting their significance in the realm of national security and the protection of intelligence identities.
community_summary.21: The relationship between Government agents and the Subversive Activities Act of 1950 is characterized by protective measures. The Act is designed to safeguard Government agents from activities that could potentially expose them to risks related to national security threats. This highlights the significance of the Act in ensuring the safety and security of individuals working in sensitive governmental roles.
community_summary.22:
The relationships involving the Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII) highlight the management and ownership dynamics surrounding this sensitive information category. 

1. **PCII and PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, ensuring its operations and compliance. This indicates a management relationship where the Program Manager plays a crucial role in the program's governance.

2. **Authorization by PCII Program Manager**: The PCII Program Manager holds the authority to authorize any changes or removals of PCII, establishing a direct and significant relationship between the manager and the information category.

3. **Ownership by the United States Government**: The PCII is owned by the entity that possesses it, specifically including the United States Government. This ownership implies that the government is a key stakeholder in the management and disclosure of PCII.

In summary, the PCII Program Manager is central to the management and authorization processes of PCII, while the United States Government holds ownership, underscoring the importance of governance and compliance in handling this critical information.
community_summary.23: The relationship between "Sensitive but Unclassified Information" and "Section 552a of Title 5" highlights the legal framework that safeguards individual privacy rights. Specifically, Section 552a of Title 5 governs sensitive but unclassified information, establishing the necessary protections for personal privacy. This relationship underscores the importance of legal guidelines in managing and protecting sensitive information that does not meet the criteria for classified status but still requires careful handling to ensure privacy rights are upheld.
community_summary.24:
The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) plays a crucial role in managing and protecting sensitive information related to national security. It categorizes information as For Official Use Only (FOUO) to safeguard it from public disclosure, ensuring that sensitive details remain confidential. Additionally, DHS manages Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) to uphold national security and public safety. 

Furthermore, DHS has the authority over Authorized Individuals, who are designated personnel empowered to request the return of information from those who have accessed it, reinforcing the security protocols associated with DHS operations. Overall, these relationships underscore DHS's commitment to protecting sensitive information and maintaining national security.
community_summary.25:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and enforcement dynamics between the United States Government and an Authorized Entity concerning DHS Form 11000-6 and Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII).

1. **Regulation of DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government regulates the use and compliance of DHS Form 11000-6, which pertains to the handling and safeguarding of information under specific agreements.

2. **Authorization of the Authorized Entity**: The United States Government grants authority to the Authorized Entity, enabling it to enforce agreements and manage disclosures related to PCII.

3. **Enforcement Mechanisms**: The United States Government retains the right to seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, establishing a legal oversight relationship.

In summary, the United States Government plays a crucial role in regulating information handling through DHS Form 11000-6, authorizing an entity to manage sensitive information, and enforcing compliance to maintain the integrity of agreements related to critical infrastructure information.

The relationships outlined highlight significant connections between various legal frameworks and protections concerning disclosures and employee rights.

1. **Executive Order No. 12958 and Section 7211 of Title 5**: Both establish guidelines and obligations regarding disclosures to Congress, emphasizing the importance of transparency and accountability in the context of employee rights and responsibilities.

2. **Section 1034 of Title 10 and the Military Whistleblower Protection Act**: Section 1034 specifically protects military members who disclose information, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act reinforces these protections, illustrating a strong commitment to safeguarding the rights of military personnel in reporting misconduct or wrongdoing.

In summary, these relationships underscore the critical role of legal provisions in ensuring that both civilian and military employees are protected when making disclosures, thereby promoting a culture of accountability and integrity within government and military operations.

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.

The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.
